_README: REFERENCE ONLY — do NOT blindly overwrite Unity's generated Packages/manifest.json.

- com.unity.xr.arcore: MUST equal the arfoundation version number exactly.
ARCore Extensions is added separately via 'Add package from git URL':
It will appear in manifest.json as a git dependency line (shown below, commented
conceptually — remove the placeholder if Package Manager wrote its own).
